title: Formal and casual introductions
objective: Elegir saludos y expresiones de presentación adecuados para situaciones formales e informales.

activities.prompt: You meet a manager for the first time at work.
options: Good morning. It is nice to meet you.
activities.correct_answer: Good morning. It is nice to meet you.
activities.feedback_correct: Es un saludo cortés y apropiado para el trabajo.
activities.feedback_incorrect: En un primer encuentro profesional usa una expresión formal.

activities.prompt: Hi, I am Carlos. Nice to meet you.
activities.feedback_correct: Too muestra que el sentimiento es mutuo.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Responde a Nice to meet you con la expresión equivalente.

activities.prompt: You need to leave a meeting politely.
options: It was nice meeting you. Goodbye.
activities.correct_answer: It was nice meeting you. Goodbye.
activities.feedback_correct: Es una despedida educada para una reunión.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Escoge una expresión apropiada para un contexto profesional.

activities.feedback_correct: La expresión completa es Nice to meet you, too.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Empieza con Nice y termina con too.

activities.instruction: Relaciona la situación con la expresión.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Piensa si la situación es profesional, académica o casual.

activities.prompt: Good afternoon. My name is Mr. Brown. I am the new supervisor. Nice to meet you. Nice to meet you, too.
activities.question: What is Mr. Brown's role?
activities.feedback_incorrect: Escucha la frase después de My name is Mr. Brown.

activities.prompt: Formal: Good morning. My name is ___. It is nice to meet you. Casual: Hi, I am ___. Nice to meet you.
activities.feedback_correct: Diferencias el tono formal y casual con claridad.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Practica primero la versión formal y después acorta el saludo casual.

activities.prompt: Message 1: Good evening, Dr. Lee. My name is Paula. Message 2: Hey Mike! I am Sam. How are you?
activities.question: Which message is more formal?
activities.feedback_correct: Good evening y Dr. Lee crean un contexto formal.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Observa el título y el saludo de cada mensaje.

activities.prompt: Write a formal introduction for a new manager and a casual introduction for a new classmate.
activities.feedback_correct: Ajustas tu presentación a cada situación.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Usa Good morning/It is nice to meet you en la versión formal y Hi/Hey en la casual.

activities.prompt: First meet the AI at a job interview, then meet the same AI as a classmate. Change your greeting, tone, and questions for each context.
success_criteria: uses formal greeting in first scenario
uses casual greeting in second scenario
activities.feedback_correct: Puedes presentarte con el tono adecuado según la situación.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La IA compara tus dos versiones y propone una frase más natural.
